author: Claude
message:
fix(auth): correct nullability annotation on refreshSession out-parameter

The `newSession` parameter is an out-parameter: callers pass the address
of a Session pointer to receive the refreshed session. The pointer-to-
pointer itself must be non-null (you must pass a valid address), even
though the pointed-at value may be null on failure.

Change annotation from `* _Nullable * _Nullable` to `* _Nullable * _Nonnull`
to accurately reflect this contract and suppress erroneous static-analyzer
warnings when callers pass a stack-allocated pointer.

Corresponds to security audit finding H-002.

author: Claude
message:
test: add remaining Priority 3/4/6/7/8 coverage

New test files:
- Network/XrpcAdminMethodsTests.m: XrpcAuthHelper nil/empty/malformed header
  rejection, XrpcIdentityHelper nil-resolver graceful failure,
  XrpcAdminMethods class availability
- Compat/NSDataCompatTests.m: Base64 encode/decode round-trip, binary data,
  empty data, constant-time comparison, dataWithContentsOfFile:options:error:

Extended test files:
- Repository/CARInteropTests.m: testCAREncodeSingleBlock, testCAREncodeMultipleBlocks,
  testCARRootCIDPreserved, testCARRejectsTruncated (Priority 4)
- Network/PDSNetworkTransportTests.m: testInitWithConnectionSetsDefaultQueue,
  testConnectionStateChangeHandlerIsRegistered (Priority 3)
- CLI/PDSCLITests.m: testAdminCommandExists, testDaemonCommandExists,
  testInitCommandExists, testOAuthCommandExists (Priority 7)
- CLI/PDSCLIServiceStubTests.m: PDSCLIInputHelper non-interactive mode,
  default values, confirmation, choice; PDSCLIAccountManager path/host/endpoint
  accessors (Priority 7)
- Tests/test_main.m: register XrpcAdminMethodsTests, NSDataCompatTests
